prismic.name: Prismic
prismic.short_description: A headless CMS and page builder with AI translation and an MCP integration letting ChatGPT or Claude update pages via prompt.

features.description: A headless CMS where pages are assembled from reusable, brand-approved sections called slices.

features.description: Included even on the Free plan for moving content into or out of Prismic.

pros: Free plan includes 4M API calls/month and unlimited documents, types, and assets
Self-serve pricing is fully published from Free through the Platinum tier
Founded in 2013 with 10,000+ websites built on the platform
Native MCP integration lets ChatGPT and Claude make prompt-driven edits across pages
cons: User seats are limited on lower tiers — 1 user on Free, 3 on Starter
The AI landing page builder is a separate paid add-on, not included in base plans
Enterprise features like SSO and a dedicated Customer Success Manager require a custom quote

faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan includes 1 user, 4 million API calls/month, and 100GB of CDN bandwidth/month at no cost.

faqs.answer: Yes, including AI translation and prompt-driven page updates through its MCP integration with ChatGPT and Claude.
